declared_scope: Cycle-4 OS.0 queue seed candidate: canonical v0.12 stack with zram retained and vm.swappiness raised from 60 to 100.
hypothesis: More aggressive reclaim into zram may improve the memory-pressure refault channel on memory-constrained Linux hosts without regressing cold-start, sustained inference, network, idle/load power, or safe revert behavior.
rollback_method: Preset delegates apply/undo/dry-run to the v0.11 zram+swappiness stack with CURSIVEOS_SWAPPINESS=100; harness reverts at run end.
